description: Style Note Taking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: White dial with silver and white hands and black hour marks Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: 3-faced chronograph display, day aperture on the dial, branding on the dial and screw to reset time Water resistant to 10 BAR Size Case diameter: 43 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
